text:
[root@vm202 ~]# service nslcd stop
nslcd not running?

[root@vm202 ~]# service nslcd start
nslcd already running?  (pid=27846).

# ps aux | grep daemon
...
root    27846   0.0  0.0  10428     0  -  IWs  -            0:00.00 daemon: /usr/local/bin/telegraf[27847] (daemon)
